channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle Update 2 Patch Notes Released
item.description: MachineGames has released a new patch for Indiana Jones and the Great Circle, addressing various quality-of-life issues, including gameplay bugs and save file problems.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Cinco casos de uso ‘top’ de modelos de lenguaje pequeños
item.description: Desde que ChatGPT llegó a finales de 2022, los grandes modelos de lenguaje (LLM) han seguido elevando el nivel de lo que pueden lograr los sistemas de IA generativa.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Musk's Alliance with Trump Sparks Debate Over Benefits and Risks
item.description: The relationship between Elon Musk and Donald Trump has created an alliance that could have far-reaching effects in both realms, sparking debate over its benefits and risks.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, SARAH PARVINI and AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Why AI company Databricks just scored one of the biggest funding rounds in history
item.description: The San Francisco-based data analytics company Databricks has raised a stunning $10 billion funding round, which values the company at $62 billion and likely puts it on a path toward an IPO.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: The latest twist in the embarrassing WordPress saga involves pineapple pizza
item.description: The drama at WordPress has taken a number of twists and turns in the months since Matt Mullenweg, founder and CEO of for-profit WordPress host Automattic, shut off access to WP Engine, a third-party platform that many users deploy to host their websites.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: EPA fosters IT resilience through cloud, integrated teams, automation tools
item.description: EPA's CIO says modernized tools and integrated teams help the agency meet the changing needs of the public more easily and consistently. The post EPA fosters IT resilience through cloud, integrated teams, automation tools first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network

item.title: Equinix to end its bare-metal service
item.description: Hosting and colocation giant Equinix is sunsetting its bare-metal infrastructure-as-a-service (IaaS) offering by June 2026. New features will no longer be added to Equinix Metal, as the service was called.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Warren asks for conflict-of-interest rules covering Musk
item.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) is expressing her concerns about apparent conflicts of interest posed by Elon Musk serving as a top adviser in the new administration and asking for President-elect Trump to explain what ethics standards will apply to the billionaire businessman.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, The Hill

item.title: House task force releases sweeping end-of-year report on AI
item.description: The House Task Force on Artificial Intelligence (AI) released its sweeping end-of-year report Tuesday, laying out a roadmap for Congress as it crafts policy surrounding the advancing technology. The 253-page report takes a deep dive into how the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Phillips 66 to build 88-acre solar project on Contra Costa County site
item.description: The Rodeo Renewable Energy Complex will consist of more than 70,000 solar modules that will generate about 60,000 Megawatt Hours per year of electricity, enough to power 23,000 electric vehicles for an entire year.
item.dc:creator: Nick Mcconnell, The Mercury News

item.title: EU investigates TikTok over Romanian presidential election safeguards
item.description: LONDON (AP) — European Union regulators said Tuesday they're investigating whether TikTok breached the bloc's digital rulebook by failing to deal with risks to Romania's presidential election, which has been thrown into turmoil over allegations of electoral violations and Russian meddling.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: EU reveals sites for major AI factories across Europe
item.description: European Commission confirms seven locations for its next-generation AI Factories, more applications welcome.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 could have a thinner build and an Apple-inspired S Pen
item.description: Samsung is reportedly considering an Apple Pencil-like stylus for the Galaxy Z Fold 7, which has some good and bad points relative to current S Pens.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: CISA lays out how agencies, industry should respond to major cyber incidents
item.description: The draft national cyber incident response plan comes eight years after the last update, and more than six years after the creation of CISA itself. The post CISA lays out how agencies, industry should respond to major cyber incidents first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Senate report alleges Amazon rejected warehouse safety recommendations due to productivity concerns
item.description: At least two internal Amazon studies found a link between how quickly the online retailer's warehouse workers perform tasks and workplace injuries, but the company rejected many safety recommendations out of concern the proposed changes might reduce productivity, according to a U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Rising Trade Tensions: US to Designate Cloud Providers as Global Gatekeepers for Advanced AI Chips
item.description: US government proposes rules to designate cloud providers like Google and Microsoft as global gatekeepers for advanced AI chips, sparking trade tensions with China and other countries.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: What IT hiring looks like heading into 2025
item.description: Despite low unemployment in the IT industry, IT hiring has slowed over the past two years and is expected to plateau in 2025 as employers prioritize experienced candidates with specialized skills, according to three new studies.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Chatbot's deadly prompt
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Court denies TikTok's request to halt enforcement of potential US ban until Supreme Court review
item.description: A federal appeals court on Friday left in place a mid-January deadline in a federal law requiring TikTok to be sold or face a ban in the United States, rejecting a request made by the company to halt enforcement until the Supreme Court reviews its challenge of the statute.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Sophia, a famous robot and global icon of AI, wins hearts at Zimbabwe's innovation fair
item.description: HARARE, Zimbabwe (AP) — From answering questions from Cabinet ministers, academics and students on climate change, substance abuse and the law to children’s inquiries about her “birth” and links to God and being described as a talkative feminist, Sophia, the world-famous robot won hearts at an innov
item.dc:creator: BY FARAI MUTSAKA, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: DoorDash steps up driver ID checks after traffic safety complaints
item.description: DoorDash will require its drivers to verify their identities more often as part of a larger effort to crack down on unauthorized account sharing. DoorDash has been under pressure to ensure its drivers are operating legally.
item.dc:creator: DEE-ANN DURBIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Sweden gets one of the EU’s seven AI factories
item.description: The new Swedish AI factory is named Mimer and is one of seven now selected by the EU. Mimer is one of five of these AI factories that will now have a brand new AI-optimized supercomputer.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to keep your holiday shopping a secret on Amazon
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how to keep your online Amazon gift purchases a secret from loved ones or friends this holiday season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dashboards, sharing threat intelligence help USDA improve cybersecurity response
item.description: When it comes to cybersecurity, the more data you have, the easier it is to identify anomalies and stop adversaries, shares Agriculture CISO Ignatius Liberto. The post Dashboards, sharing threat intelligence help USDA improve cybersecurity response first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: AI app helps you turn anything into LEGO models
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
